---
title: "ImprtanceHeatmap"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-29"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r libraries, echo=FALSE}
library(writexl)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(forcats)
library(patchwork)
library(tidyr)
library(scales)
library(shadowtext)
```

```{r paths, echo=FALSE}
PROJECT_ROOT <- getwd()
OUTPUT_DIR <- file.path(PROJECT_ROOT, "figures")
IMP_DIR <- file.path(PROJECT_ROOT, "datasets", "FeatureImp")
dir.create(OUTPUT_DIR, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r importance merge, echo=FALSE}

summary_table <- read_excel(file.path(IMP_DIR, "AAP_List.xlsx"))
xgboost_imp <- read.csv(file.path(IMP_DIR, "xgboostimp.csv"), sep = ";")
linearsvm_imp <- read.csv(file.path(IMP_DIR,"linearsvmimp.csv"), sep = ";")
rf_imp <- read.csv(file.path(IMP_DIR,"rfimp.csv"), sep = ";")
mlagnn_imp <- read.csv(file.path(IMP_DIR,"mlagnnimp.csv"), sep = ";")
summary_table <- summary_table %>% inner_join(xgboost_imp, by = "Symbols")
summary_table <- summary_table %>% inner_join(rf_imp, by = "Symbols")
summary_table <- summary_table %>% inner_join(linearsvm_imp, by = "Symbols")
summary_table <- summary_table %>% inner_join(mlagnn_imp, by = "Symbols")

write_xlsx(path = file.path(IMP_DIR, "AAP_Summary_List.xlsx"), summary_table)
```

```{r heatmap, echo=FALSE}
df <- read_excel(file.path(IMP_DIR,"AAP_Summary_List.xlsx"))

importance_cols <- c("XGBoostImp", "RFImp", "LinearSVMImp", "MLAGNNImp")

importance_rank <- df %>%
  select(Symbols, adj.P.Val, all_of(importance_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(importance_cols),names_to = "Model",values_to = "Importance") %>%
  group_by(Model) %>%
  mutate(Rank = min_rank(desc(Importance))) %>%ungroup()

top_features_rank <- importance_rank %>%
  group_by(Symbols, adj.P.Val) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_rank = mean(Rank, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups ="drop") %>%
  arrange(mean_rank) %>%
  slice_head(n = 103)

plot_data <- importance_rank %>%
  semi_join(top_features_rank, by = c("Symbols", "adj.P.Val")) %>%
  left_join(top_features_rank, by = c("Symbols", "adj.P.Val")) %>%
  mutate(Symbols = fct_reorder(Symbols, mean_rank, .desc = TRUE),Model = factor(Model, levels = importance_cols)
         )

p_heatmap <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Model, y = Symbols, fill = Rank)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_shadowtext(
    aes(label = Rank),
    size = 6,
    colour = "black",
    bg.colour = "white",
    bg.r = 0.12
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C",direction = -1) +
  labs(
    title = "Feature-Importance Ranking across Classification Models",
    subtitle = "All 103 genes by mean rank",
    x = "Classification model",
    y = "Gene",
    fill = "Rank") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 22),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 22),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 22, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 22),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

p_adj <- top_features_rank %>%
  mutate(
    Symbols = fct_reorder(Symbols, mean_rank, .desc = TRUE),
    adj_p_label = number(
      adj.P.Val,
      accuracy = 0.0001,
      decimal.mark = ".",
      big.mark = ""
    ),
    p_value_group = ifelse(adj.P.Val < 0.1, "p < 0.1", "p >= 0.1")
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = "Adj.P.val", y = Symbols)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = adj_p_label, color = p_value_group),size = 6,hjust = 0.5,vjust = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("p < 0.1" = "red","p >= 0.1" = "black"),guide = "none") +
  scale_x_discrete(position = "top") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_void(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 58, r = 8, b = 8, l = 8)
  )

final_plot <- p_heatmap + p_adj + plot_layout(widths = c(4, 1))

ggsave(filename = file.path(OUTPUT_DIR,"feature_importance_rank_heatmap.pdf"),plot = final_plot,
  width = 12,height = 28,units = "in",device = cairo_pdf)
```
